states.name: Freya
states.title: Goddess of Love and War
states.description: Love and war—these two aren't opposites. Sometimes people fight because of love, sometimes love is born from fighting. And sometimes, conflict is an irrefutable proof of love.

states.name: Freya
states.title: Goddess of Love and War
states.description: The red-headed goddess's love burns vehemently, beautifully. What she loathes the most is a cowardly heart. In her eyes, there is no expression of love beyond mutual struggle.

states.name: Freya
states.title: Goddess of Love and War
states.description: A single figure stands among the sea of corpses, as if grieving. Yet again, no man could withstand the ferociousness of her love. As she looks up to the sky, her heart makes a wish—for true peace, possible only through conflict, and for fulfilment of her love.
